    1. buildPowerSources(String, SolarisPowerSource.BatteryReadings, SolarisPowerSource.PowerSourceFactory)

Class SolarisPowerSource

java.lang.Object
oshi.hardware.common.AbstractPowerSource
oshi.hardware.common.platform.unix.solaris.SolarisPowerSource
All Implemented Interfaces:
PowerSource
@ThreadSafe public abstract class SolarisPowerSource extends AbstractPowerSource
Abstract base for the Solaris PowerSource. The default values and the bif/bst battery math are shared; the native battery/acpi_drv kstat read is done by the JNA and FFM subclasses, which populate a SolarisPowerSource.BatteryReadings and hand it to buildPowerSources(String, SolarisPowerSource.BatteryReadings, SolarisPowerSource.PowerSourceFactory).

    Nested Classes
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    static final class 
    SolarisPowerSource.BatteryReadings
    Raw values read from the battery BIF0 (info) and battery BST0 (state) kstats.
    protected static interface 
    SolarisPowerSource.PowerSourceFactory
    Creates a concrete (JNA or FFM) Solaris power source from the computed battery fields.

  • Method Details

    • buildPowerSources

      protected static List<PowerSource> buildPowerSources(String name, SolarisPowerSource.BatteryReadings readings, SolarisPowerSource.PowerSourceFactory factory)
      Computes a single battery PowerSource from the given readings, building the concrete instance with the supplied factory.
      Parameters:
      name - the power source name
      readings - the raw battery kstat values
      factory - creates the platform-specific instance
      Returns:
      a single-element list with the battery power source
